name: TypeScript check
command: cd backend && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../frontend && npx vue-tsc --noEmit

name: Passkey library (@simplewebauthn/server) smoke test
command: cd backend && node -e "const lib=require('@simplewebauthn/server'); lib.generateAuthenticationOptions({rpID:'localhost',allowCredentials:[]}).then(o=>{if(!o.challenge)throw new Error('no challenge');console.log('passkey OK')}).catch(e=>{process.stderr.write(e.message);process.exit(1)})"

name: Passkey login/begin endpoint responds
command: PORT=${PORT:-4001}; curl -sf --connect-timeout 3 -X POST http://localhost:$PORT/api/auth/passkey/login/begin -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"probe@example.com"}' -o /dev/null || echo 'passkey-login-begin: server not running (skipped)'
